untranslatable_reason: Signal requires tracking competitor order matching patterns (3+ matches in last 5 bids), historical win rate of leapfrog skips (>60%), and willingness-to-execute thresholds. These are behavioral/execution attributes not available as standard market indicators. vol_ratio_20 and atr_14 approximate market spread conditions, but the core logic (competitor pattern matching, confidence thresholds, time precedence mechanics) cannot be fully expressed using only OHLCV-derived indicators.
translation_notes: MICROSTRUCTURE_DRY_6_1 is a sophisticated order placement strategy tied to order book dynamics and competitive behavior prediction. Translated entry conditions approximate 'wide spread' (vol_ratio as proxy for relative spread activity) and 'sufficient volatility to justify skips' (atr_14 >= 2 ticks). Exit on adverse move (atr expansion >3) represents market moving against the position. The signal is fundamentally untranslatable without access to order flow, competitor identity tracking, and historical bid-match statistics.
